vocab.meaning: lối sống ít vận động (dùng để nêu lý do tập thể thao)
vocab.example: I took up swimming primarily to counteract the effects of a sedentary lifestyle spent behind a desk.

vocab.meaning: trạng thái thể chất đỉnh cao
vocab.example: Professional athletes spend years of disciplined training to remain in peak physical condition.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác đạt được thành tựu
vocab.example: Completing a marathon gives you an unparalleled sense of accomplishment that boosts your self-esteem.

vocab.meaning: bài tập cường độ cao, vất vả
vocab.example: I prefer moderate activities like jogging over more strenuous exercise like weightlifting.
Basketball is a great way to foster team spirit and learn how to cooperate effectively with others.

vocab.meaning: đi bộ đường dài giữa thiên nhiên hùng vĩ
vocab.example: For me, nothing beats a long hike in the great outdoors to reconnect with nature and clear my mind.

vocab.meaning: tính cách ham mê cạnh tranh, đua tranh
vocab.example: My competitive streak always comes out when I'm playing tennis with my older brother.

vocab.meaning: sức mạnh cơ lõi (bụng, lưng, hông)
vocab.example: Pilates is specifically designed to improve your core strength and overall body posture.
Any form of vigorous sport helps to release endorphins, which act as a natural stress reliever.

vocab.meaning: khả năng phối hợp tay và mắt
vocab.example: Sports like table tennis are excellent for honing your hand-eye coordination and reflexes.
